comp.description: CrossAir CA-C03 2.4GHz ceramic monopole antenna, 5.5x2.0x1.0mm. Pin 1 is marked RF feed; pin 2 is solder-fixing terminal and is not electrically routed. Requires vendor 10x7mm clearance and board-edge placement.

comp.description: ST IIS3DWB10ISTR new-generation 16-pin 4.5x4.5mm wettable-flank LLGA vibration sensor with ISPU; exact DS14585 pin map. Default footprint uses a TN0018 Rev 8 formula-derived 0.70x0.50mm land pattern; verify against official ST CAD/Gerber before production release.

libpart.description: CrossAir CA-C03 2.4GHz ceramic monopole antenna, 5.5x2.0x1.0mm. Pin 1 is marked RF feed; pin 2 is solder-fixing terminal and is not electrically routed. Requires vendor 10x7mm clearance and board-edge placement.

fields.field: CrossAir CA-C03 2.4GHz ceramic monopole antenna, 5.5x2.0x1.0mm. Pin 1 is marked RF feed; pin 2 is solder-fixing terminal and is not electrically routed. Requires vendor 10x7mm clearance and board-edge placement.

libpart.description: Texas Instruments CSD87313DMS active 30 V dual common-drain N-channel NexFET for battery protection; 5.5 mOhm max source-to-source at 4.5 V; 100 nA max gate leakage; DMS8 WSON-CLIP 3.3 x 3.3 mm. Pins 9/10 are CAD-only exposed-source land numbers per TI-linked CAD convention.

fields.field: Texas Instruments CSD87313DMS active 30 V dual common-drain N-channel NexFET for battery protection; 5.5 mOhm max source-to-source at 4.5 V; 100 nA max gate leakage; DMS8 WSON-CLIP 3.3 x 3.3 mm. Pins 9/10 are CAD-only exposed-source land numbers per TI-linked CAD convention.
